content.hero_headline: Bold Flavors Rolling Straight to Your Street
content.hero_subtext: Alexis Food Truck brings premium, handcrafted bites to every corner of the city.
content.about_text: At Alexis Food Truck, we believe great food should be an experience, not just a meal. Every dish is crafted with fresh, locally sourced ingredients and a whole lot of love. Whether you're grabbing a quick lunch or feeding a crowd, we bring premium quality right to your neighborhood.
content.contact_text: Find us near you or book Alexis Food Truck for your next event — we'd love to feed your crew!
